specific_change.target: Comprehensive rightsizing: switch compute from m5.2xlarge × 12 to m5.large × 6; downsize database from db.r6g.4xlarge to db.r6g.xlarge. Leave network unchanged.
specific_change.produced: Right-size compute from m5.2xlarge × 12 to m5.large × 6 and database from db.r6g.4xlarge to db.r6g.xlarge. Retain the existing ALB and network tier unchanged, as network throughput and latency are hea
